context: Signed during Malaysia Aerospace & Defence Industry Mission to Australia, led by Defence Minister Mohamed Khaled Nordin
significance: Landmark Malaysia-Australia defence industrial cooperation — advanced aerospace, energetics, and defence systems partnership
witnessed_by: YB Dato' Seri Mohamed Khaled Nordin (Minister of Defence)
General Tan Sri Muhamad Norazlan Aris (Chief of RMAF)
Lieutenant General Dato' Hj Fazal Hj Abdul Rahman (DG Defence Intelligence)
Tan Sri Dato' Dr. Johari Abdul (Speaker of Parliament)
HE Datin Paduka Sharrina Abdullah (High Commissioner to Australia)
